MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Braiding & Packing Works of America, Inc. and Sharper Finish, Inc., (FKA New Super Laundry Machinery Co., Inc.).
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Eugenia Medley, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Walter Medly, Deceased, and Sandra Medley, as Legal Heir of Walter Medley, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Braiding & Packing Works of America, Inc. and Sharper Finish, Inc., (FKA New Super Laundry Machinery Co., Inc.).
Default was entered against defendant Braiding & Packing Works of America, Inc. on September 6, 2011.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Braiding & Packing Works of America, Inc. was filed and served on September 6, 2011.

Statement of Damages as to defendant Sharper Finish, Inc., (FKA New Super Laundry Machinery Co., Inc.), on November 7, 2011.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 4, 2017.

Total - $1,066,937.00.
